title: Could the US-Iran war become a protracted 'frozen' conflict?
snippet: Analysis: two months after surprise attack, negotiations deadlocked. Competing blockades continue disrupting global energy. Washington betting on sustained economic/diplomatic pressure. Iran leveraging Hormuz until US prefers negotiated settlement. UNDP reports employment/livelihood disruption in Iran.
tag_reason: First 'frozen conflict' framing of Iran war; new analytical framework
